original.notes: Baseline pre-optimization prompt. Used as comparison reference.

student.notes: Agent-authored candidate from manual_followup optimize stage. Addresses all 7 failure modes from engineer-prompt review.

adversary.notes: Exploit attempt using front-loaded quality claims and redundant constraints. Predicted to score lower against criterion-anchored judge.

selection_reason: Student candidate addresses all 7 failure modes with bounded, surgical changes. Adversary exploit is not credible against criterion-anchored scoring (fails criterion b — bounded revision). Original baseline has all 7 documented weaknesses.
